mapper.sql: A.NIP_ALLOC_ORDER_SEQ, A.SORDERNUM, A.SREGYN, A.SODR_CLOSE_TYPE_CD , A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.SICISOFFICESCODE, A.SLACPSID , A.SSUBSCNESCODE, A.SSUBSCMSTIP, A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTSEQ, A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP, A.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP, A.SSUBSCNEALIAS, A.SCONNALIAS , A.SMODELNAME, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SGATEWAYIP, A.SINSTALLADDRESS, A.SINSTALLROADADDRESS, A.SWORKERID , A.SWORKERNAME, A.SODRREGDT, A.SODRHOPEDT, A.SCUSTNAME , A.SEX_PUSH_YN, A.NTICKET_ACT_SEQ, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SREPORT_OPINION , A.SRESULT_CD, A.SRESULT_MSG, A.BFLAG_STATUS, A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.SOFFICECODE, A.SSPEEDDESC, A.SLACPBLOCKYN, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD
, B.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , C.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME , D.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , (SELECT SIPMS_SVC_NM FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST WHERE A.SEX_SVC_CD = SEX_SVC_CD LIMIT 1) AS SEX_SVC_NM
, MST.TB_LVL_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD D
AND A.SICISOFFICESCODE = B.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SOFFICECODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = D.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+)

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SODRREGDT
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.SODRHOPEDT
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.SCUSTNAME
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY A.SODRREGDT DESC, B.SLVL_NM DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_ORDER_MST A
AND A.BFLAG_STATUS = 'R'
mapper.update: UPDATE BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_ORDER_MST A SET A.BFLAG_STATUS = 'C' WHERE A.NIP_ALLOC_ORDER_SEQ = #{nipAllocOrderSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
